title: Define Wave 26 manager queue action completion contract
description: Extend architecture contracts with queue action completion semantics, response envelopes, UX state transitions, and backward compatibility notes for manager dashboard queue flows.
acceptance_criteria: Contract defines queue action endpoint request/response and deterministic error envelopes
UI state map covers loading, optimistic update, conflict, unauthorized, and retry states
Cross-wave compatibility section documents Wave 24/25 dashboard + queue baseline guarantees
